# format: html5-dom-v1
# status: active
# include_parse_errors: true
#document
  <!doctype html>
  <html>
    <head>
    <body>
      <select>
        <option>
          "A"
      <input>
      "B"
parse-errors:
  tree-builder: before-html-implicit-html
  tree-builder: before-head-implicit-head
  tree-builder: after-head-implicit-body
  tree-builder: in-body-input-start-tag-closes-select
